name: ALZ Compliance Ontology Test Data
description: Test data following 60-20-10-10 distribution for OAA v5.0.0 compliance, covering all 16 entities including WAF, CAF, and E2E audit workflow entities

edgeCases.note: Legacy framework with deprecated policy set

invalidCases.expectedError: frameworkId required, frameworkName required, version must be semver

typical.description: Ensure that your virtual network deployment aligns to your enterprise segmentation strategy defined in the GS-2 security control
typical.implementationGuidance: Use Azure Virtual Networks, NSGs, and Azure Firewall to segment traffic

typical.description: Protect data in transit against out-of-band attacks using encryption
typical.implementationGuidance: Enable TLS 1.2 or higher on all services, use HTTPS, configure minimum TLS version

typical.controlName: Use centralized identity and authentication system
typical.description: Use Azure AD as the default identity and authentication method
typical.implementationGuidance: Configure Entra ID, disable local authentication, implement Conditional Access

edgeCases.controlName: Boundary Protection | Isolation of System Components
edgeCases.description: Implement subnetworks for publicly accessible system components that are physically and logically separated from internal networks
edgeCases.implementationGuidance: Use DMZ patterns with Azure Firewall and private endpoints

typical.description: The ability of a workload to perform its intended function correctly and consistently
Protecting applications and data from threats through defense in depth strategy
Managing costs to maximize the value delivered while achieving business objectives

edgeCases.description: Operations processes that keep a workload running in production with efficient deployment and development practices
edgeCases.note: Has significant overlap with DevOps practices

boundaryCases.description: Efficiently meeting demands through proper resource selection and scaling approaches

invalidCases.expectedError: pillarCode must be enum [RE,SE,CO,OE,PE], pillarName required, description >=20 chars, focusAreas 1..*, advisorCategory required

typical.description: Define business justification and expected outcomes for cloud adoption initiatives
Prepare the cloud environment for planned adoption including landing zone deployment
Implement governance controls to ensure consistent management of cloud environments

edgeCases.description: Execute the migration or innovation plan to move workloads to the cloud and realize business value
edgeCases.note: Deliverables may vary significantly by project

boundaryCases.description: Convert cloud adoption aspirations into an actionable plan with prioritized workloads

invalidCases.expectedError: phaseName required, phaseOrder must be 1-6, description >=20 chars, keyActivities 1..*

boundaryCases.note: Minimum scope - single subscription, 1 day duration

invalidCases.expectedError: auditId required, sessionId must be UUID, auditName required, auditDate must be valid date, tenantId required, subscriptionScope 1..*, status must be enum, completedAt without startedAt invalid

typical.description: Extracts complete inventory of all Azure resources across subscriptions in scope
typical.queryText: Resources | project id, name, type, location, resourceGroup, subscriptionId, tags | order by type asc

typical.description: Assesses storage account security settings including TLS, public access, and encryption
typical.queryText: Resources | where type == 'microsoft.storage/storageaccounts' | extend tlsVersion = properties.minimumTlsVersion, publicAccess = properties.allowBlobPublicAccess | project name, resourceGroup, tlsVersion, publicAccess

typical.description: Retrieves Microsoft Cloud Security Benchmark v2 compliance status from Defender for Cloud
typical.queryText: SecurityResources | where type == 'microsoft.security/regulatorycompliancestandards' | where name contains 'MCSB'

edgeCases.description: Queries resources for reliability pillar assessment including backup status and availability zones
edgeCases.queryText: Resources | where type in ('microsoft.compute/virtualmachines', 'microsoft.sql/servers/databases') | extend hasBackup = isnotnull(properties.backupRetentionPeriod)

invalidCases.expectedError: queryId required, queryName required, description >=20 chars, queryText required, queryCategory must be enum, outputFile required, outputFormat must be json/csv

edgeCases.note: Query returned zero results (empty JSON array)

invalidCases.expectedError: resultId required, queryRef required, captureTimestamp must be ISO8601, outputFilePath required, recordCount non-negative, resultFormat must be json/csv
assessmentId required, assessmentDate ISO8601, workloadScope 1..*, scores 0-100, recommendationCount non-negative

typical.description: 1-2 page summary of key findings, risk summary, and prioritized recommendations for executive stakeholders
Comprehensive documentation of current Azure environment state including architecture, security posture, and governance maturity
Complete listing of all Azure resources with metadata, tags, and configuration details for technical review

edgeCases.description: Unprocessed JSON exports from all audit queries for technical teams requiring raw data access

boundaryCases.description: Metrics dashboard in Markdown format for embedding in documentation repositories

invalidCases.expectedError: deliverableId required, deliverableName required, deliverableType must be enum, format must be enum, targetAudience must be enum, description >=20 chars
resourceId must be valid ARM format, subscriptionId must be GUID

typical.mappingRationale: Both controls require network segmentation and boundary protection for publicly accessible systems
Both controls mandate encryption of data in transit using cryptographic mechanisms
MCSB IM-1 covers centralized identity which partially addresses ISO A.9.2.1 user registration

edgeCases.mappingRationale: Custom insurance network control is thematically related but not technically equivalent

invalidCases.expectedError: sourceControl required, targetControl required, mappingStrength must be enum [exact,partial,related]

typical.remediationAction: Set minimumTlsVersion to TLS1_2 in ARM template or portal
Enable Azure RBAC authorization in Key Vault properties
Associate NSG with subnet via ARM or portal

edgeCases.remediationAction: Manual review and configuration required - no automated policy available

invalidCases.expectedError: assessmentId required, assessmentDate must be ISO8601, scope required, frameworks required, score 0-100, findings non-negative

typical.remediationGuidance: Set minimumTlsVersion to TLS1_2 in storage account configuration

typical.expectedState: Azure RBAC mode for data plane
typical.remediationGuidance: Enable Azure RBAC for data plane access in Key Vault properties
Create and attach NSG to subnet with appropriate rules

boundaryCases.currentState: Public network access enabled with no firewall rules
boundaryCases.expectedState: Private endpoint only or firewall rules configured
boundaryCases.remediationGuidance: IMMEDIATE: Disable public access and configure private endpoint

invalidCases.expectedError: findingId required, severity must be enum, affectedResource required, violatedControl required, priority 1-5

typical.requirementName: Operational Resilience - IT Security for Outsourcing
Outsourcing and Third Party Risk Management

boundaryCases.note: Future-dated regulation not yet in force

invalidCases.expectedError: requirementId required, requirementName required, regulatoryBody must be from enum

distributionChart:
```mermaid
pie title Test Data Distribution (96 instances across 16 entities)
    "Typical (60%)" : 58
    "Edge Cases (20%)" : 16
    "Boundary (10%)" : 11
    "Invalid (10%)" : 11
```
